# Define normalization and similarity functions, then search for top matches
import re, math
from collections import Counter

def normalize_ar(text):
    # Remove tatweel
    text = re.sub('\u0640', '', text)
    # Remove diacritics (harakat)
    text = re.sub('[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0671\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', text)
    # Map hamza forms to bare alif or letters
    mapping = {
        'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا',
        'ؤ':'و','ئ':'ي','ٱ':'ا',
        'ء':'ء' # keep bare hamza maybe
    }
    text = ''.join(mapping.get(ch, ch) for ch in text)
    # Remove punctuation and symbols
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064A\s]', ' ', text)  # keep Arabic letters and underscores and whitespace
    # Replace underscores and digits? Remove Latin letters unnecessarily present
    # Collapse spaces and lowercase (not needed)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# Test normalization
orig_span = "إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا أُنْذِرُوا بِسُوءٍ أَخَذُوا فِي أَيْدِيهِمْ وَالْأَبْرَارُ أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ أَتَوْا الْأَحْزَابَ مَا أَتَوْا الْأَحْزَابَ فَإِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ لَمْ يَكُونُوا لِلْفَاحِشَاتِ سَبِيلًا"

# token F1 similarity
def token_f1(a, b):
    atoks = a.split()
    btoks = b.split()
    a_counts = Counter(atoks)
    b_counts = Counter(btoks)
    common = sum((a_counts & b_counts).values())
    if common==0:
        return 0.0
    prec = common / len(atoks)
    rec = common / len(btoks)
    if prec+rec==0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

scores_f1 = []
for i,n in enumerate(qnorms):
    f1 = token_f1(input_norm, n)
    scores_f1.append((f1, i))

scores_f1_sorted = sorted(scores_f1, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
scores_f1_sorted[:15]
